name: Administrator - (Counter:Side)
description:
"Don't be a stranger. Let's have a chat."

I made this because I believe Admin is a underrated character stuck in a dead game. I planned to make this a casual bot that you can chat simply but I ended up adding much more. I did my best to stay true to the character as much as I can even though it's probably impossible. I tried a lot of things while making this bot so I hope I didn't butcher it. Probably bit more than I can chew.

Administrator with Lee Sooyeon

Administration's Failure

Thanks to Counter:Side Wiki for images.
creator: Dohler
